title: Goa Proposes AI Policy to Foster Digital Innovation and Governance by 2027
description: Goa's IT department has unveiled a draft artificial intelligence policy aimed at revolutionizing sectors such as education, healthcare, and tourism by 2027. Stakeholders including industry experts are invited to provide feedback on this forward-looking initiative.
content: Panaji: The IT department has prepared a draft artificial intelligence policy for Goa and circulated it among stakeholders for feedback. Officials said further consultations will continue in the coming weeks with industry players, academicians and ce... [1279 chars]

title: AI to play major role in tomorrow’s warfare: CDS Anil Chauhan at Raisina Dialogue
description: New Delhi, Mar 7 (PTI) Chief of Defence Staff General Anil Chauhan on Saturday said the world is at the cusp of a huge transformation where artificial intelligence and autonomous systems will influence future warfare. In his remarks during a panel discussion at the 11th Raisina Dialogue here, Gen Chauhan also said that as the […]
content:
Emphasising the growing role of AI in military use, Gen Chauhan said that AI is playing a major part in the ongoing conflicts as well.
Earlier, military might was based on platforms, tanks, aircraft, ships, and submarines, but today, apart from those... [2006 chars]

title: GROK35K: The Next AI-Driven Token and How to Maximize Its Potential
description: Rethinking the AI‑Value Paradigm Artificial intelligence today often depends on centralized subscription models, usage credits, or access tokens maintained by a few dominant platforms. While workable for many applications, this paradigm restricts seamless interaction between AI agents, and introduces friction, inefficiency, and middlemen in how AI consumes resources, pays for services, or licenses data. title: Formula One team deploys Aussie AI for a technical edge

title: Musk accuses Anthropic CEO of 'projecting' over AI consciousness concerns
description: SpaceX and Tesla CEO Elon Musk accused the head of Anthropic, an artificial intelligence company that is at odds with the Pentagon over its use, of "projecting" this week.

title: Oracle and OpenAI drop Texas data center expansion plan
description: ORACLE and OpenAI have abandoned plans to expand a flagship artificial intelligence (AI) data center in Texas after negotiations dragged over financing and OpenAI’s changing needs, Bloomberg News reported on Friday, citing people familiar with the matter.

title: Helping young professionals become indispensable in the AI-driven labor market
description: AS companies increasingly integrate artificial intelligence (AI) into their operations, a critical question emerges: Are we — as a society that includes employers, educators, policymakers and technology providers — preparing young people for a workplace where essential AI skills will very soon become the norm while many traditional entry-level tasks may soon be automated? To achieve this goal, our collective efforts need to address three fundamental challenges.
